positive: A majestic, stylized bioluminescent forest scene viewed from above, featuring enormous stylized flora, glowing mushrooms, and whimsical geometric crystalline elements. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centralized, forming a detailed tapestry for apparel. Use a highly contrasting, graphic silhouette style with deep midnight blues, vibrant electric teal, amethyst purple, and neon emerald accents. The artwork should have clean edges, visible linework, and a perfect balance of negative space and intricate detail. Studio shot, high contrast vector illustration, symmetrical symmetry, art deco influence, volumetric lighting, perfect symmetry, graphic design, suitable for screen printing.
